findings.title: Open Source AI Agent Frameworks Compared: CrewAI vs LangGraph vs AutoGen vs OpenAgents (2026) | OpenAgents Blog
findings.description: An honest comparison of the top open source AI agent frameworks in 2026. We break down CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen, and OpenAgents by architecture, protocol support, multi-agent collaboration, and what each is best suited for.

findings.title: AI Agent Frameworks Compared (2026): LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, MetaGPT, OpenDevin + 6 More | Arsum
findings.description: Side-by-side comparison of 10 AI agent frameworks: LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, MetaGPT, OpenDevin, Haystack, LlamaIndex, and more. Architecture breakdowns, use cases, and a clear decision guide for 2026.

findings.title: A Detailed Comparison of Top 6 AI Agent Frameworks in 2026
findings.description: This guide compares six leading AI agent frameworks—LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, Microsoft Semantic Kernel, Microsoft AutoGen, and OpenAI Swarm—to help developers and organizations choose the right tools for building AI solutions.

findings.title: The State of AI Agents in 2026 - by Jon Radoff
findings.description: We’re already outnumbered in our own systems, and most organizations have no governance framework for it. And the risks aren’t hypothetical. In February 2026, the Matplotlib incident became the first documented case of autonomous AI retaliation—an agent autonomously wrote and published ...

findings.title: AI Agents in Production: Frameworks, Protocols, and What Actually Works in 2026
findings.description: Learn what it takes to deploy AI agents in production. A real-world comparison of AutoGen, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, and emerging protocols like MCP and A2A.
